title: Appendix 8: Coverage Under the Fair Labor Standards Act
summary: This appendix explains FLSA coverage, exemption classifications (executive, administrative, learned professional, creative professional, teachers, ministers), overtime calculation rules, and special pay arrangements applicable to diocesan employees.
notes: 1) The document is labeled 'Appendix 8' and dated 'Rev 12/16,' interpreted as December 2016; no explicit effective date is stated, so last_review_date is assigned with low confidence. 2) The salary threshold of $47,476/year ($913/week) cited reflects the 2016 DOL rule that was subsequently enjoined and later superseded; a human reviewer should verify whether this figure has been updated to reflect current DOL thresholds. 3) The ministerial exception section explicitly names the Diocese of Pensacola-Tallahassee, confirming diocesan origin but also meaning this document may not be current for another diocese without revision. 4) The document appears to be an educational/reference appendix rather than a standalone policy—it likely belongs to a larger HR or Employee Handbook; the chapter/section address assigned is speculative. 5) No review cadence, approval authority, or next review date is stated. 6) The document is cut off mid-sentence in the 'Wage augments' section, suggesting pages are missing.
